creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #4)

Hello Joseph,

With a visual inspection of the patch, it seems to be okay.

If you want I can test if the port update works fine.

But I have no way to test if it actually updates the microcode as I have Ryzen (Family=0x19 Model=0x21) which is not included in the microcode update (only someone with EPYC can test it).
